title: (Junior) Content Marketing Specialist (m/w/d)
matched_skills: B2B marketing experience (IoT, ATM, ERP-adjacent sectors)
missing_skills: CRM platform hands-on operation (Zoho or equivalent)
Email marketing execution (campaign builds, templates, flows)
German language fluency (CV shows B1+; role requires DACH-level fluency)
core_responsibilities: Implement email campaigns and communication flows in CRM (Zoho)
Maintain and segment contacts and target groups in CRM
Support automated campaigns and customer journey workflows
Create and maintain email templates and campaign modules for international markets
Create and adapt marketing texts for products and campaigns
recommended_emphasis: Highlight customer segmentation experience as the strongest transferable skill
Reference B2B campaign analytics work (IPC, GRG) to show marketing context
Mention any hands-on tool usage adjacent to CRM (e.g., Confluence/JIRA for workflow management)
Emphasise German language progress and willingness to operate in German-language market
overqualified_note: Candidate has 4+ years of international marketing analytics and PMO experience across FinTech, IoT, and shipping sectors. This is a junior/entry-level content-ops role focused on CRM execution and email marketing. The seniority mismatch is significant. Additionally, the role requires German fluency (DACH-facing) while CV indicates B1+ only. Recommend deprioritising unless candidate is specifically targeting a career pivot into hands-on CRM/content marketing.

company_info.size_raw: ~100-200 employees (B2B ERP/software provider for furniture industry)
